focus_points.label: What feels unclear about expectations right now.
focus_points.reason: Whether he feels clear on what “good” looks like for his level and what success means in the next few weeks, since this is the three-month dip point.

focus_points.label: How safe he feels asking for help.
focus_points.reason: Whether he feels connected to support and safe raising questions or blockers, especially if he’s carrying frustration while trying to prove himself.

focus_points.label: Shifting requirements — what’s hardest to handle.
focus_points.reason: Notes suggest frustration with changing requirements; could be the churn itself, unclear decision ownership, or difficulty getting tradeoffs resolved—worth clarifying what part feels hardest right now.

focus_points.label: Where the team setup is making it harder.
focus_points.reason: What he wants more of from you that would reduce friction in the daily loop—like faster clarification, clearer ownership, or more structured check-ins—so the role isn’t harder than it needs to be.
